signup.title: Sign up
signup.checkEmailBody: Click the link we sent you to verify your account.

overview.notEnoughData: Not enough data yet — run analysis a few times to see your Clinic Score.
overview.topTasksEmpty: No open tasks. Run analysis to generate some.

form.name: Business name
form.currentTool: What do you currently use for competitor/reputation tracking?

errors.already_linked: This business is already linked to an account.
errors.business_already_exists: You already have a business linked. Each account supports one business.

enrichmentFailed.title: We couldn't fetch your business data
enrichmentFailed.body: We couldn't retrieve details for this Google Place ID. Please check the ID and try linking your business again.

discovering.title: Scanning competitors in your area
discovering.subtitle: This can take up to a minute.

selection.title: Choose your competitors
selection.subtitle: Select between 3 and {max} businesses to track.
selection.limitedResults: We found a limited number of strong competitors in your area.

errors.discover_failed: We couldn't scan competitors right now. Please try again.
errors.business_not_enriched: Your business data isn't ready yet.
errors.plan_limit_exceeded: You've selected more competitors than your plan allows.
errors.save_failed: We couldn't save your selection. Please try again.

analysis.runButtonPending: Running analysis… this can take a few minutes

errors.business_not_enriched: Your business data isn't ready yet.
errors.insufficient_competitors: Select at least 3 competitors before running analysis.
errors.apify_call_failed: We couldn't fetch reviews right now. Please try again.
errors.review_save_failed: We couldn't save the fetched reviews. Please try again.
errors.ai_provider_not_configured: Analysis isn't available right now. Please try again later.
errors.analysis_cooldown_active: You can run analysis again on {date}.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.empty: No tasks yet. Run analysis to generate some.

evidence.competitiveGap: This theme appears positively {competitorPositive} times in competitor reviews — {ownPositive} times in yours.
evidence.absoluteQuality: In the last {days} days, this theme has {ownNegative} negative mentions in your own reviews.

errors.update_failed: We couldn't update this task. Please try again.

history.title: Task History
history.empty: No completed or dismissed tasks yet.

themes.title: Themes
themes.empty: No theme data yet. Run analysis to generate it.

trend.title: Trend
trend.notEnoughData: Not enough data yet. Trend becomes meaningful as more analysis cycles run.

common.footer: You're receiving this because you have a business linked to your ClinicRadar account.

weeklyDigest.subject: Your weekly ClinicRadar summary for {businessName}
weeklyDigest.heading: Weekly summary — {businessName}
weeklyDigest.intro: Here's what happened in the last 7 days:

themeSpike.subject: {businessName}: sudden spike in "{theme}"
themeSpike.heading: Critical signal detected
themeSpike.body: Mentions of "{theme}" for {businessName} increased {multiplier}x compared to the previous cycle. We recommend reviewing it right away.
